{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","old":"DEPTH = 2","new":"DEPTH = 4","anchor":"","function":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 12","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 16","anchor":"","function":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","old":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.0","new":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.1","anchor":"","function":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","old":"OPTIMIZER = "adam"","new":"OPTIMIZER = "adamw"","anchor":"","function":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 5e-4","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 2e-3","anchor":"","function":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-5","anchor":"","function":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","old":"USE_LR_SCHEDULE = False","new":"USE_LR_SCHEDULE = True","anchor":"","function":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_function","function":"build_scheduler","source":"def build_scheduler(optimizer: optim.Optimizer, steps_per_epoch: int):
    if not USE_LR_SCHEDULE:
        return None
    total_steps = TRAIN_MAX_STEPS if TRAIN_MAX_STEPS is not None else steps_per_epoch * 100
    total_steps = max(int(total_steps), 1)
    return optim.lr_scheduler.OneCycleLR(
        optimizer,
        max_lr=LEARNING_RATE,
        total_steps=total_steps,
        pct_start=0.1,
        anneal_strategy="cos",
        div_factor=10.0,
        final_div_factor=100.0,
    )","old":"","new":"","anchor":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"Increase MLP capacity moderately, add a small amount of dropout, switch to AdamW, and use a fixed-budget OneCycleLR so the limited 256-step run spends its updates more effectively.","secondary_modes":["indexing","topk","summaries"]}

{"declared_mode":"summaries","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"DEPTH = 4","new":"DEPTH = 2","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 16","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 12","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.1","new":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.05","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 2e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"USE_LR_SCHEDULE = True","new":"USE_LR_SCHEDULE = False","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"summaries","rationale":"The prior step likely overshot the fixed 256-step budget with a much larger MLP and an aggressive schedule. This step reverts to a compact geometry and a safer constant learning rate while keeping AdamW.","secondary_modes":["topk","layout"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"DEPTH = 2","new":"DEPTH = 3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.05","new":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.0","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"OPTIMIZER = \"adamw\"","new":"OPTIMIZER = \"adam\"","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 5e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-5","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"The 4-layer wider MLP regressed, so this step moves to a milder capacity increase over the baseline while restoring the stable Adam settings that previously gave the best visible loss.","secondary_modes":["indexing","topk","caching"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.0","new":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.05","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 5e-4","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 7e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"The deeper 3-layer MLP is still slightly undertrained relative to the best visible loss. This step adds light regularization and a small learning-rate increase to try to close that gap without changing the stable optimizer choice.","secondary_modes":["caching"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"DEPTH = 3","new":"DEPTH = 2","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 12","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 14","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.05","new":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.0","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 7e-4","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 5e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"The 3-layer variant and the higher learning rate both missed the best visible loss. This step returns to the simpler 2-layer geometry, keeps Adam, and widens the hidden stack slightly above the baseline to test whether a small capacity bump helps without the overreach that hurt earlier runs.","secondary_modes":["topk","caching"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 14","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 15","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"The 2-layer Adam baseline with width 224 is currently best, and it improved over the narrower variant. This makes a small capacity bump the most direct next test for squeezing out a bit more validation loss without changing the stable training setup.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 15","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 14","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 5e-4","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 6e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"The wider 240-unit variant regressed, so this step returns to the best-performing 224-unit width and nudges the learning rate up slightly to see whether the model was still a bit under-updated within the fixed step budget.","secondary_modes":["layout"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 6e-4","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 5e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-5","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"The 14-wide 2-layer MLP was the best geometry, and the higher learning rate regressed it. {"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-5","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 2e-5","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","rationale":"The best run so far came from the 14-wide 2-layer MLP with lighter decay, so the remaining gain likely sits in finer regularization tuning. {"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-5","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 0.0","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","rationale":"The current best came from progressively reducing regularization, and the improvement from 2e-5 to 1e-5 was still positive. {"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 5e-4","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 4.5e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"With weight decay already removed, the remaining gain is likely in a finer step-size adjustment around the current sweet spot. {"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 4.5e-4","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 5e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"The best visible run so far used the 14-wide 2-layer MLP at 5e-4 with zero weight decay.
